flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hope International University rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.2k → $10.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Hope International University vs the 2004–2008 baseline (549 vs 745).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hope International University rose 17% between 2007 and 2010 ($19.9k → $23.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hope International University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
